name: Armor Fossil
effect: A fossil from a prehistoric Pokémon that lived on the land. It appears to be part of a collar.

name: Balm Mushroom
effect: A rare mushroom which gives off a nice fragrance. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Beach Glass
effect: A piece of colored glass. Waves have rounded its edges. It's slightly rough to the touch.

name: Big Mushroom
effect: A large and rare mushroom. It is sought after by collectors.

name: Big Nugget
effect: A big nugget of pure gold that gives off a lustrous gleam. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Big Pearl
effect: A quite-large pearl that sparkles in a pretty silver color. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

name: Black Apricorn
effect: A black Apricorn It has an indescribable scent.

name: Black Flute
effect: A toy flute made from black glass. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Blue Apricorn
effect: A blue Apricorn. It smells a bit like grass.

name: Blue Flute
effect: A toy flute made from blue glass. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Blue Scarf
effect: Raises holder's Beauty aspect in a Contest.

name: Blue Shard
effect: A small blue shard. It appears to be from some sort of implement made long ago.

name: Bottle Cap
effect: Maximizes one IV stat in Hyper Training.

name: Chalky Stone
effect: A small whitish stone picked up at the edge of the road.

name: Claw Fossil
effect: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon that lived in the sea. It appears to be part of a claw.

name: Comet Shard
effect: A shard which fell to the ground when a comet approached. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Cover Fossil
effect: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon that lived in the sea in ancient times. It appears to be part of its back.

name: Damp Mulch
effect: A fertilizer to be spread on soft soil in regions where Berries are grown. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Dawn Stone
effect: Evolves certain species of Pokémon.

name: Discount Coupon
effect: This special coupon allows you to buy items at a discount when you are shopping at a boutique.

name: DNA Splicers
effect: A splicer that fuses Kyurem and a certain Pokémon. They are said to have been one in the beginning.

name: Dome Fossil
effect: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon that lived in the sea. It appears to be part of a shell.

name: Dragon Scale
effect: Evolves Seadra when traded holding the item.

name: Dubious Disc
effect: Evolves Porygon2 when traded holding the item.

name: Dusk Stone
effect: Evolves certain species of Pokémon.

name: Electirizer
effect: Evolves Electabuzz when traded holding the item.

name: Escape Rope
effect: A long, durable rope. Use it to escape instantly from a cave or a dungeon.

name: Fairy Gem
effect: Increases the power of a Fairy-type move only once.

name: Festival Ticket
effect: A ticket that allows you to host a mission in Festival Plaza.

name: Fire Stone
effect: Evolves certain species of Pokémon.

name: Fluffy Tail
effect: An item that attracts Pokémon. Use it to flee from any battle with a wild Pokémon.

name: Gold Bottle Cap
effect: Maximizes all of a Pokémon's IV stats in Hyper Training.

name: Gooey Mulch
effect: A fertilizer to be spread on soft soil in regions where Berries are grown. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Green Apricorn
effect: A green Apricorn. It has a mysterious, aromatic scent.

name: Green Scarf
effect: Raises holder's Smart aspect in a Contest.

name: Green Shard
effect: A small green shard. It appears to be from some sort of implement made long ago.

name: Growth Mulch
effect: A fertilizer to be spread on soft soil in regions where Berries are grown. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Heart Scale
effect: A pretty, heart-shaped scale that is extremely rare. It glows faintly in the colors of the rainbow.

name: Helix Fossil
effect: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon that lived in the sea. It appears to be part of a seashell.

name: Honey
effect: A sweet honey with a lush aroma that attracts wild Pokémon when it is used in grass, caves, or on special trees.

name: Ice Stone
effect: Evolves certain species of Pokémon.

name: Leaf Stone
effect: Evolves certain species of Pokémon.

name: Magmarizer
effect: Evolves Magmar when traded holding the item.

name: Max Repel
effect: An item that prevents weak wild Pokémon from appearing for 250 steps after its use.

name: Moon Stone
effect: Evolves certain species of Pokémon.

name: Nugget
effect: A nugget of pure gold that gives off a lustrous gleam. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

name: Odd Keystone
effect: A vital item that is needed to keep a stone tower from collapsing. Voices can be heard from it occasionally.

name: Old Amber
effect: A piece of amber that contains the genetic material of an ancient Pokémon. It is clear with a reddish tint.

name: Oval Charm
effect: An oval charm said to increase the chance of Pokémon Eggs being found at the Day Care.

name: Oval Stone
effect: Evolves Happiny when held.

name: Pearl
effect: A somewhat-small pearl that sparkles in a pretty silver color. It can be sold cheaply to shops.

name: Pearl String
effect: Very large pearls that sparkle in a pretty silver color. A maniac will buy them for a high price.

name: Permit
effect: A permit that is needed to enter the Nature Preserve. Not many know about it.

name: Pink Apricorn
effect: A pink Apricorn. It has a nice, sweet scent.

name: Pink Scarf
effect: Raises holder's Cute aspect in a Contest.

name: Plume Fossil
effect: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon that flew in the sky in ancient times. It appears to be part of its wing.

name: Poké Doll
effect: A doll that attracts Pokémon. Use it to flee from any battle with a wild Pokémon.

name: Poké Toy
effect: An item that attracts Pokémon. Use it to flee from any battle with a wild Pokémon.

name: Pretty Feather
effect: Can be sold for a high price.

name: Prism Scale
effect: Evolves Feebas when traded holding the item.

name: Protector
effect: Evolves Rhydon when traded holding the item.

name: Rare Bone
effect: A bone that is extremely valuable for Pokémon archeology. It can be sold for a high price to shops.

name: Reaper Cloth
effect: Evolves Dusclops when traded holding the item.

name: Red Apricorn
effect: A red Apricorn. It assails your nostrils.

name: Red Flute
effect: A toy flute made from red glass. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Red Scarf
effect: Raises holder's Cool aspect in a Contest.

name: Red Shard
effect: A small red shard. It appears to be from some sort of implement made long ago.

name: Relic Band
effect: A bracelet made in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Relic Copper
effect: A copper coin used in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Relic Crown
effect: A crown made in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Relic Gold
effect: A gold coin used in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Relic Silver
effect: A silver coin used in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Relic Statue
effect: A stone figure made in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Relic Vase
effect: A vase made in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Repel
effect: An item that prevents weak wild Pokémon from appearing for 100 steps after its use.

name: Reveal Glass
effect: A looking glass that reveals the truth. It's a mysterious glass that returns a Pokémon to its original shape.

name: Roller Skates
effect: Attaches roller skates to the bottom of your shoes, allowing you to glide quickly around and perform tricks.

name: Root Fossil
effect: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon that lived in the sea. It appears to be part of a plant root.

name: Sachet
effect: Evolves Spritzee when traded holding the item.

name: Shiny Charm
effect: A shiny charm said to increase the chance of finding a Shiny Pokémon in the wild.

name: Shiny Stone
effect: Evolves certain species of Pokémon.

name: Shoal Salt
effect: Pure salt that can be discovered deep inside the Shoal Cave. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Shoal Shell
effect: A pretty seashell that can be found deep inside the Shoal Cave. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Skull Fossil
effect: A fossil from a prehistoric Pokémon that lived on the land. It appears to be part of a head.

name: Sprinklotad
effect: A watering can shaped like a Lotad. It helps promote the healthy growth of any Berries planted in good, soft soil.

name: Stable Mulch
effect: A fertilizer to be spread on soft soil in regions where Berries are grown. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Star Piece
effect: A shard of a pretty gem that sparkles in a red color. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

name: Stardust
effect: Lovely, red-colored sand with a loose, silky feel. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

name: Strange Souvenir
effect: An ornament depicting a Pokémon that is venerated as a protector in some region far from Kalos.

name: Sun Stone
effect: Evolves certain species of Pokémon.

name: Super Repel
effect: An item that prevents weak wild Pokémon from appearing for 200 steps after its use.

name: Thunder Stone
effect: Evolves certain species of Pokémon.

name: Tiny Mushroom
effect: A small and rare mushroom. It is sought after by collectors.

name: TMV Pass
effect: A commuter pass that allows the holder to ride the TMV between Lumiose City and Kiloude City at any time.

name: Upgrade
effect: Evolves Porygon when traded holding the item.

name: Water Stone
effect: Evolves certain species of Pokémon.

name: Whipped Dream
effect: Evolves Swirlix when traded holding the item.

name: White Apricorn
effect: A white Apricorn. It doesn't smell like anything.

name: White Flute
effect: A toy flute made from white glass. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Yellow Apricorn
effect: A yellow Apricorn. It has an invigorating scent.

name: Yellow Flute
effect: A toy flute made from yellow glass. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Yellow Scarf
effect: Raises holder's Tough aspect in a Contest.

name: Yellow Shard
effect: A small yellow shard. It appears to be from some sort of implement made long ago.
